name: Notifications dashboard
pageTitle: Your import notifications - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
heading: Your import notifications
bodyCopy: Some of your notification details are missing or do not match the customs declarations. These consignments may be delayed.
secondaryActions: Manage trade partners (inferred — page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:28, link never rendered in our IUU/CHED-P corpus)
layout: govuk-grid-row > govuk-grid-column-full (with nested govuk-grid-column-two-thirds / govuk-grid-column-one-third inside the search panel)

structure.note: Primary journey entry point. Page object exposes it as both a link (getByRole link 'Create a new notification', page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:44-46) and an id (#create-notification, :12-14); the CHED-P/IUU journey drives it via the link (workflows/notification/ched-p-workflows.ts:267, :665, :851; accessibility spec tests/accessibility/ched-p-accessibility-tests.spec.ts:22).

structure.text: My alerts (View all; 250 notifications awaiting amendment; 41 notifications changed to In Progress in the last 24 hours; 94 ... Valid; 10 ... Rejected; 1 ... Cancelled; 4 ... Replaced)
Arrival / Import date range: Today / Tomorrow / Next seven days / Clear date range
Start date range (Day / Month / Year + Choose date picker)
End date range (Day / Month / Year + Choose date picker)
There is a problem — Some of your notification details are missing or do not match the customs declarations. These consignments may be delayed. (Review these notifications)
Sort by: Arrival (newest to oldest) / Arrival (oldest to newest)

notification-list — one bespoke card per notification (Reference number / Commodity / Arrival at BCP or POE / CHED status / Consignee / Consignor / Origin / Inspection + Copy as new / View details / Amend / Show notification)

govukComponents.usage: Alert / Information / Chosen-for-inspection message banners at the top of the dashboard
Create a new notification / Clone a certificate (links styled as buttons), Search, Update sort, and date shortcut buttons
Search filters: BCP or POE, Status, Country of origin, Notification type; plus Sort by
govukComponents.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (5 govuk-select nodes confirmed: bcp, certificate-status, country-of-origin, certificate-type, orderBy)

govukComponents.usage: Keywords, Commodity, Consignee / Importer, Microchip number search fields (plus date Day/Month/Year inputs)
Start date range and End date range (Day/Month/Year triplets)
Groups the date-range shortcut buttons and the two date inputs
Persistent 'There is a problem' data-quality warning about notification details not matching customs declarations
CHED status / inspection status tags inside notification cards (multiple colour variants)
Search-field hint text under Keywords and Commodity

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: A bespoke pop-up calendar widget attached to each date-range Day/Month/Year triplet, with previous/next-month navigation, a heading (e.g. 'July 2026'), a date table and a Choose date reveal icon
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom JS calendar not part of the GOV.UK Design System; the DS only ships the plain Date input pattern. Adds JS, a11y and maintenance burden the rebuild should avoid.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: GOV.UK Date input (three text fields) with no calendar overlay; if a picker is essential, the moj-date-picker from the MoJ Design System is the DS-adjacent choice

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke card-per-notification grid; each card is a definition list (Reference number, Commodity, Arrival at BCP or POE, CHED status, Consignee, Consignor, Origin, Inspection) with Copy as new / View details / Amend / Show notification actions. Per-row elements carry stable ids the tests key off: reference-number-0, status-0, inspection-status-0, arrival-date-{ref}, decision-date-{ref}, and the per-row action controls view-details-{ref}, copy-as-new-{ref}, amend-details-{ref} (inferred).
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom layout + column classes rather than a GOV.UK component. The new IUU app needs a listing but should express it with a standard component. NOTE a possible layout discrepancy: the page object also addresses the list via table semantics (#notifications-page tbody tr / td), which conflicts with the card-grid seen in the trace — see openQuestions.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk Summary list per item, or a responsive Table; MoJ 'sortable table' if column sorting is needed
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (snapshot cards e324+). Row/action id scheme inferred from page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:100-106,128-130,224-250

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: A bespoke collapsible 'Search notifications by' filter panel wrapping the keyword/commodity/BCP/status/country/type/microchip/date controls
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom show/hide filter container, not a DS component. Fine as plain markup but the collapse behaviour is bespoke JS.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Plain form inside govuk-grid layout; use Details for progressive disclosure of advanced filters if collapse is required

nonStandardPatterns.concern: Predates / does not use the official govuk-pagination component (added to the DS later). Custom markup and icons.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke 'My alerts' summary box listing counts of notifications by status change (awaiting amendment, In Progress, Valid, Rejected, Cancelled, Replaced) as links
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom summary widget, not a DS component; visually resembles error-summary but is an informational digest.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Summary card or a plain list of links; Summary list for the count digest

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: notification-button overrides the Create-a-new-notification button; link-button styles the date shortcut buttons (Today/Tomorrow/Next seven days) as inline text buttons; clear-link styles the Clear reset link; tag--fixed-width forces uniform tag width
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Small bespoke style overrides layered onto govuk-button/govuk-tag — deviations from standard component styling.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Standard govuk-button (and govuk-button--secondary) and govuk-tag without width/appearance overrides

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Live-region and screen-reader-only helpers for the search/results interaction
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Bespoke a11y plumbing; acceptable in principle but hand-rolled rather than provided by a component.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: No direct DS component; keep as an ARIA live region if a live count is needed

fields.name: certificate-number
fields.label: Keywords or notification number
fields.hint: For example: reference, destination, consignor, transporter, documents

fields.name: bcp
fields.label: BCP or POE
fields.conditionalOn: reference data — the new app will source BCP/POE list from a reference-data service, not hardcode it
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (combobox e229). First value 'All' selected; the first 11 options listed here (All + 10 'ABC Legal - ...') are the true contiguous head of the list. The entries from 'APHA - GBAPHA1A' onward are a NON-CONTIGUOUS sample — every value shown is verified present in the DOM, but ~150 further 'ABC Legal - ...' seed entries (and 'ABCD - ...') sit between 'ABC Legal - EDUDNXVO' and 'APHA - GBAPHA1A'. The list is a mix of real seed/test BCPs and real ports, sourced dynamically; the new app must source it from reference-data

fields.name: certificate-status
fields.label: Status
fields.optionValues: The 'New' option submits the value 'NEW' (uppercase), confirming option values differ from display labels; the new app must map label->value. Only 'NEW' is corroborated by test code; other values inferred to follow the same convention.
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (combobox e233). Option value 'NEW' inferred from page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:265 (showNewNotifications -> selectOption('NEW')) and exercised by tests/dashboard/dashboard-search.spec.ts:85,101

fields.name: country-of-origin
fields.label: Country of origin
fields.optionValues: Options carry ISO alpha-2 codes as values (e.g. Afghanistan -> 'AF'), confirming label != submitted value. Corroborated for 'AF' only; other codes inferred to follow ISO-3166.
fields.conditionalOn: reference data — full ISO country list plus 3 grouping options; the new app will source it from a reference-data service
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (combobox e237). Value 'AF' inferred from page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:270 (showByCountryOfOrigin) exercised with 'AF' at tests/dashboard/dashboard-search.spec.ts:102,143,184

fields.name: certificate-type
fields.label: Notification type
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (combobox e246). NOTE: there is NO standalone 'IUU' type — IUU fishery products are filed under CHED-P today, which is why this journey is scoped as CHED-P (fish)

fields.name: microchip-number
fields.label: Microchip number (CHED-A only)
fields.conditionalOn: labelled 'CHED-A only' — not relevant to the IUU/CHED-P journey

fields.comment: Shortcut buttons, not a named input; the date values populate start-date-* / end-date-*
fields.label: Arrival / Import date range
fields.hint: Shortcut buttons: Today, Tomorrow, Next seven days, Clear date range
fields.behaviour: Clicking 'Today' / 'Tomorrow' sets BOTH the Start and End date range to that single day (start == end); 'Next seven days' sets a start..end span and results fall inclusively within it. These are behavioural requirements asserted by the date-filter tests (inferred).
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (group e253, buttons e256-e259). INFERRED: page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:56-58 also exposes a 'Yesterday' shortcut button (btnSearchByYesterday) — never rendered in our notification-dashboard trace; only exercised against the record-control dashboard and currently in a commented-out test (tests/dashboard/dashboard-search.spec.ts:477-509), so it may be a control/decision-dashboard-only shortcut. Behaviour assertions: Today/Tomorrow single-day at tests/dashboard/dashboard-search.spec.ts:234-236,263-269; Next-seven-days range at :302-303

fields.name: start-date-day / start-date-month / start-date-year
fields.label: Start date range
fields.hint: Day / Month / Year, with a 'Choose date' calendar picker
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (group e262, Day/Month/Year e268/e272/e276, Choose date e278)

fields.name: end-date-day / end-date-month / end-date-year
fields.label: End date range
fields.hint: Day / Month / Year, with a 'Choose date' calendar picker
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (group e284, Day/Month/Year e290/e294/e298, Choose date e300)

fields.name: orderBy
fields.label: Sort by:
fields.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (combobox e322, applied via 'Update sort' button e323)

validationMessages.message: Some of your notification details are missing or do not match the customs declarations. These consignments may be delayed.
validationMessages.trigger: Persistent data-quality alert shown at the top of the results list when the trader has notifications whose details do not match the customs declarations; links to 'Review these notifications' (/no-match-results). NOT a form-submission validation error.
validationMessages.evidence: trace db2d277c5c8bfcf2dc0f2278bc92dc7aa8fdf42d action 9 (error summary e311-e318, title 'There is a problem')

openQuestions: The dashboard is a listing + search + data-quality-alert surface for ALL CHED types, not an IUU-specific page. The only load-bearing requirement for the IUU rebuild is the entry point: the 'Create a new notification' primary action (href /notification/vnet/protected/notifications/consignment/page-1?source=dashboard) that begins the journey, plus 'Clone a certificate' (out of scope per the CHED-PP ruling that cloning is out).

The Notification type filter has no 'IUU' option — IUU fishery products are filed as CHED-P today. Confirm the new standalone IUU app still needs a dashboard entry point at all, or whether IUU pre-notifications will be created from a different surface.

Search/filter, sort, pagination, per-notification cards and the 'My alerts' digest are dashboard-management features. GAP: whether the new IUU app must reproduce any of these list-management capabilities, or only the create-notification entry point. This needs a human product decision.

IPAFFS uses a bespoke defra-datepicker, notification-list card grid, custom pagination and info-summary box — all outside the GOV.UK Design System. If the rebuild needs a listing/pagination it should use govuk Table/Summary list + govuk Pagination + the plain Date input, not copy these widgets.

The 'Recover notifications from archive' and archived-notifications surface, and the 'Consignments to be inspected' / 'Chosen for inspection' banners, are adjacent features not exercised by the IUU create flow — scope TBD.

LAYOUT DISCREPANCY (finding): the trace renders the results as a bespoke card grid (notification-list__row cards), but the page object addresses the same list via TABLE semantics — #notifications-page tbody tr and td (page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:244-250). Either the markup is a table styled as cards, or the tbody/tr locators are stale/unused (they are not referenced by any ched-p test). Rendered reality (cards) wins; confirm which the real DOM is before the rebuild picks a govuk Table vs Summary-list listing.

SEARCH BEHAVIOUR (inferred requirements from tests/dashboard/dashboard-search.spec.ts): searching by an exact reference returns a result count of exactly 1 and renders that notification's View-details control (:93-95); a non-matching commodity code returns a count of 0 (:119-122); filters compose (Status=NEW + Country=AF narrows to the single expected row, :101-112). The result count is surfaced in an element #notification-count (page object :260-262). If the IUU app keeps a listing it should honour these count/compose semantics.

TRADE-PARTNER INTERSTITIAL (inferred, out of IUU scope): the 'Manage trade partners' secondary action leads through a Yes/No radio + Continue confirmation to a 'Manage your authorisations' page (page-objects/notification/NotificationDashboardPage.ts:36-42,252-254; tests/tradePartner/manage-trade-partner.spec.ts:7-10). Not part of the create-notification entry point; recorded only so the surface is not mistaken for a dashboard field.

A 'Yesterday' date shortcut exists on the shared dashboard page object (btnSearchByYesterday) but was never rendered in our notification-dashboard trace and is only exercised (in a currently commented-out test) against the record-control dashboard. Confirm whether 'Yesterday' is a notification-dashboard control at all, or control/decision-dashboard-only.
